title: skeep's Cardboard Mod
description: Adds tons of cardboard stuff, ranging from cardboard tools to cursed cardboard phones and lots of other goodies!
body:
[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/available_on-curseforge-orange%3F?logo=curseforge&logoColor=%23F16436&color=orange&link=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.curseforge.com%2Fminecraft%2Fmc-mods%2Fya017zans-cardboard)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ya017zans-cardboard) Cardboard is a mod that... essentially adds cardboard, ranging from cardboard swords to cardboard blocks and fully working cardboard phones!

How to make cardboard

To make cardboard you need cards and boards, you can find cards in a structure called Magician's Box which contains cards left by a mysterious magician: To get boards you can make 16 of them using 2 logs shaped like a stick, then you just put 1 card and 1 board and then you made cardboard.

Cardboard Stuff

These are all the stuff that you can find or craft in this mod.
NOTE : This list won't be expanded anymore, it's kind of ridiculous how long this is Cardboard Block : you need 9 cardboard to make 1 cardboard block (Tip: you can craft it back to cardboard) Cardboard Stick : you need 2 cardboard to make 4 cardboard sticks Cardboard Sword : you need one cardboard stick and 2 cardboard to make one (Tip: it doesn't really do much damage) Cardboard Phone : you need 6 cardboard sticks and 3 cardboard to make one, put 3 up to bottom on the left and right and then just put 3 cardboard up to bottom in the middle Cardboard Money : you can get Cardboard money from using the cardboard phone and clicking money Un-Magicifier : Un-Magicifier is a new block that can be crafted by surrounding 1 magical cardboard with 8 iron ingots and replacing the top middle with redstone, it can turn magical items into normal items and gives you the new... Magic Spark : which is a new item that if you put any normal item that DOES have a magical version in the third slot of the smithing table and putting the Magic Spark on the 2nd, you can turn it into a magical one again! Cardboard Steak : Cardboard Steak is a food item that can be traded with the butcher when he's still novice (Tip: you can't really digest it) Cardboard Apple : Cardboard Apple is a new food item which can be crafted by surrounding an apple with 4 cardboard on the edges (Tip: you still cannot digest) Cardboard Coffee : Cardboard Coffee is a drink that gives you speed II when drinked, you can make cardboard mugs and put 1 cardboard mug and one cocoa bean to make cardboard coffee Cardboard Arcade Game : Cardboard Arcade Game is an arcade machine which does absolutely nothing but looks cool, it can be crafted with 8 cardboard surrounding 1 redstone dust and 1 magical cardboard on top of the redstone dust Cardboard Cleaner Robot : Cardboard Cleaner Robot is a new mob that cleans up cardboard blocks "kids these days throwing all their cardboard around" There are also magical items that i'll let you find what they do your self (;
